name: RUBINSTEIN-TAYBI SYNDROME
definition: BROAD THUMB SYNDROME rare sporadic syndrome without known chromosomal / biochemical markers; M÷F = 1÷1
dominant_finding: radial angulation of distal phalanx (50%) caused by trapezoid / delta shape of proximal
discriminating_features: short broad "spatulate" terminal phalanges of thumb and great toe ± angulation deformity
radial angulation of distal phalanx (50%) caused by trapezoid / delta shape of proximal
thin tubular bones of hand + feet
